title: COVID-19 12 to 15 vaccination programme funding for schools: conditions of funding
body: " The conditions of funding set out the eligibility, payments and allocations for the coronavirus (COVID-19) 12 to 15 vaccination programme funding for schools.  The spreadsheet shows the allocations, at school level, for the one-off payment.  Find out more about the 12 to 15 vaccination programme.  "

taxons.title: Health, safety and wellbeing in schools
